title: asthenatherum forskaolii var. arundinaceum
intro: Asthenatherum forskaolii var. arundinaceum, also known as Forskohlii, is a plant-based extract derived from the roots of the Asthenatherum forskaolii plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Asteliaceae. Forskohlii has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to inhibit the production of an enzyme called phosphodiesterase, which has been linked to various health benefits. The health benefits of Forskohlii include improved cardiovascular health, increased testosterone levels, and enhanced exercise performance, making it a popular ingredient in supplements and herbal preparations. Forskohlii can be prepared as a dietary supplement in capsule or tablet form, or as a powder that can be added to food or drinks, and it is often combined with other herbs and nutrients to enhance its effects.
